title: Cicero: Letter 49 (to Atticus or Family)
description: Letter 49 of Cicero — one of nearly 800 surviving letters that document the last decades of the Roman Republic.
introduction: Letter 49 of Cicero — one of nearly 800 surviving letters that document the last decades of the Roman Republic.

translation.text: Letter 49: 'Greetings, my dear friend. The political situation grows daily more grave. Caesar marches on Rome. The Republic stands on the edge of an abyss. Let us not lose hope, but stand firm in our principles.'
